mechanism: This pattern captures mean_reversion trades on Tuesday where stocks have fallen moderately from 52-week highs (medium distance) but show weak recent momentum (low EMA50 slope), suggesting a technical oversold bounce rather than a genuine trend reversal. The uptick on D6 entry represents early capitulation exhaustion in a bearish phase, where weak_hands_capitulation creates short-term buying opportunities before the longer-term downtrend potentially resumes.
